seo.title: Web Design in Nova Scotia for Local Businesses | Hatt Digital
seo.description: Hatt Digital builds clean, mobile-friendly websites for Nova Scotia businesses — built to turn visitors into calls and quote requests. Local SEO included, flat honest pricing.

hero.title: Websites that work as hard as you do.
hero.sub: Hatt Digital builds clean, mobile-friendly websites for Nova Scotia businesses — designed to turn visitors into calls, messages, and quote requests, without the agency runaround.

why.heading: No buzzwords. Just the things that grow your business.
why.intro: A website isn’t a brochure that sits there. Built right, it’s the hardest-working part of your business — turning a late-night search into a call the next morning, while you do the actual work.
why.lead_heading: A site that earns its place on your business card.
why.lead_body: Most local websites are digital dust collectors. Yours should be the thing that quietly works in the background — the reason someone picks you over the next name on the list.

stats.label: person you actually talk to — the one building it
hidden fees, surprise invoices, or lock-in
yours: domain, site, and content in your name

tiles.title: Get found on Google
tiles.text: Local SEO is built into every site, so when someone nearby searches for what you do, your business is what they find.

tiles.title: Turn visitors into calls
tiles.text: Clear layout, fast load times, and obvious ways to get in touch. Built to get you leads — not just to look pretty.

tiles.title: Sharp on every phone
tiles.text: Most customers see your site on their phone first. Every site I build looks sharp and works perfectly on any screen.

start.heading: Ready to get your website handled properly?
start.body: Tell me about your business, your goals, and a budget you’re comfortable with, and I’ll put together a fair, all-in quote built around what you actually need. No pressure, no obligation — even if you’re still deciding.
steps: Choose the website option that sounds closest to your needs
Tell me your goals, timeline, and a comfortable budget
I reply with a clear, fair quote — usually within one business day
We refine it together until it’s right, then I build it

work.heading: Mini case studies, built to convert.
work.intro: Each build is structured around one goal: making it obvious what the business does, why it’s trusted, and how to get in touch. The builds below are demos that show what a stronger online presence could look like for a local niche.

cases.alt: Toner and office supplies website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Toner Supplies Website
cases.desc: A demo build for a local toner and office-supply business. The goal: make a large product range easy to browse, build trust quickly, and turn “just looking” into a quote request.

cases.alt: Electrical contractor website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Electrical Contractor Website
cases.desc: A demo build for an electrical contractor. The brief: lay out services clearly, prove the business is trustworthy fast, and make requesting a quote the obvious next step.

cases.alt: Marine services website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Marine Business Website
cases.desc: A demo build for a local marine business. Organised so services are easy to scan, trust is built early, and customers can reach out without hunting for contact details.

pricing.heading: Three clear ways to get your website built.
pricing.intro: Choose the option that sounds closest to what you need. Every project gets a fair, custom quote built around your goals — no fixed template pricing, no guesswork.
pricing.foot: Every business is different. Choose the option that sounds closest to what you need, then tell me your goals and budget. I’ll build a fair quote around the actual project.

tiers.name: Starter Website
tiers.label: Best for getting online properly
tiers.sub: A clean, focused website for small businesses that need a professional online presence without overcomplicating things.

tiers.name: Business Website
tiers.label: Best for most businesses
tiers.sub: A stronger website for service businesses that need more pages, better structure, and more trust before customers reach out.

tiers.name: Growth Website
tiers.label: Best for custom needs
tiers.sub: A more flexible website option for businesses that need extra pages, custom sections, quote flows, booking flows, or CMS/editable content.

earns.eyebrow: How a website earns its keep
earns.heading: Your website should do more than sit there.
earns.intro: A good site guides people from “just looking” to actually reaching out — with clear messaging, trust, speed, and simple ways to contact you.

steps.title: Clear first impression
steps.text: Visitors instantly understand what you do and who it’s for — no scrolling to figure it out.

steps.title: Proof you’re real
steps.text: Professional design, local details, and the small signals that tell people you’re legit and nearby.

steps.title: Easy to reach you
steps.text: Obvious calls, forms, maps, and buttons that make getting in touch take one tap, not three.

steps.title: A real enquiry
steps.text: The visitor becomes a call or message in your inbox — instead of quietly leaving for a competitor.

whyhd.heading: Agency quality without the agency runaround.
whyhd.intro: Bigger agencies can be a good fit for bigger companies. Hatt Digital is built for local businesses that want a clean, professional website — without a bloated process, confusing handoffs, or unclear pricing.

points.title: You work directly with the builder
points.text: The person you talk to is the person designing and building your site.

points.title: No runaround or handoffs
points.text: No account managers or ticket queues. One point of contact, start to finish.

points.title: Mobile-first as standard
points.text: Most customers see you on a phone first, so every site is built to look sharp there.

points.title: Clear, flat quotes
points.text: You see one all-in number before work starts. No surprise invoices later.

points.title: Local SEO basics included
points.text: The setup that helps nearby customers find you — not an upsell.

points.title: Built to get you contacted
points.text: Every page points toward calls, messages, and quote requests.

diy.heading: Why not just use Squarespace or Wix?
diy.intro: Website builders are useful tools — but the tool isn’t the strategy. You can spend hours dragging sections around and still end up with a site that looks okay yet doesn’t explain your offer clearly, build trust, show up properly on Google, or turn visitors into calls and quote requests.
diy.cta_heading: Want the site handled properly from the start?
diy.cta_body: You could build it yourself — but if you want it done right and built around getting leads, I can handle it.

cards.title: Templates aren’t a strategy
cards.text: A template gives you a starting point. It doesn’t know what your customers need to see, what questions they have, or what makes them trust your business.

cards.title: A good website is more than how it looks
cards.text: The structure, copy, mobile layout, service pages, calls-to-action, contact flow, SEO basics, and trust signals all matter just as much as the design.

cards.title: You don’t need another project
cards.text: You already have a business to run. Hatt Digital handles the structure, design, setup, forms, mobile layout, launch details, and cleanup for you.

cards.title: Built to get contacted, not just look nice
cards.text: A nice-looking site isn’t the goal. The goal is to help people understand your business, trust it, and reach out.

local.heading: Your website, built by the person you actually talk to.
local.body1: Hatt Digital is run by Evan Hatt, right here in Nova Scotia. That means you’re not being passed between salespeople, account managers, and developers. You deal directly with the person designing, building, and launching your website.
local.body2: I work with local businesses across Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford, the South Shore and beyond — contractors, trades, and service businesses that want a site that actually brings in work.

process.heading: From first message to launch — no mystery.
process.intro: You’ll always know exactly where things stand and what happens next.

steps.title: Chat
steps.text: A quick, free call to understand your business and what you actually need. Zero pressure.

steps.title: Plan & quote
steps.text: A clear, flat price and timeline up front — so you know exactly what you’re paying before anything starts.

steps.title: Design & build
steps.text: I design it, you review it, and we refine it together until it’s right. No surprises at the end.

steps.title: Launch
steps.text: Your site goes live. I make sure everything works and show you how to manage it. Then I’m still here.

reviews.heading: Real reviews will live here.
reviews.intro: Hatt Digital is a growing local studio. As projects wrap up, genuine client feedback goes right here — no stock photos, no made-up quotes, no fake five-stars.

quotes.quote: Client feedback coming soon. This space is reserved for real reviews from local businesses I’ve worked with.
No stock quotes and no invented names. When a client leaves feedback, it’ll show up here exactly as they wrote it.

invite.title: Have we worked together?
invite.text: Your honest feedback can be featured here. Get in touch and let me know how it went.

faq.heading: Questions business owners ask me.
faq.intro: The honest answers to the things people want to know before they reach out.
faq.cta_heading: Got a question that isn’t here?
faq.cta_body: See the full FAQ, or just send it over and I’ll give you a straight answer.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: Every project is quoted individually, because every business is different. Pick the package that sounds closest to what you need, tell me your goals and a budget you’re comfortable with, and I’ll build a fair, flat quote around the actual project. Whatever number you agree to is the number you pay — no surprises.

items.q: How long does a website take?
items.a: Most sites go live within 2–3 weeks once I have your content. A simple one-page site can be ready in about a week.

items.q: Can you redesign my current website?
items.a: Absolutely. If your current site is slow, dated, or hard to use on a phone, I’ll rebuild it into something modern — keeping what works and fixing what doesn’t.

items.q: Why not just use Squarespace or Wix?
items.a: Those builders are good tools, but the tool isn’t the strategy. Most owners don’t have the time or the design, SEO, and copywriting know-how to turn a template into a site that actually brings in leads. That’s the part I handle.

items.q: What happens after I contact you?
items.a: I reply within one business day with honest advice and clear next steps. No pressure and no obligation — even if it’s just feedback on what you already have.

cta.heading: Ready to make your website easier to trust and easier to contact?
cta.body: Send me your current site, your business idea, or what you need built. I’ll take a look and let you know the best next step — free.
